{{Infobox character
| name = Jades
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Jades represent a specific level of advancement or rank for [[sacred artists]]. Individuals at this stage can utilize [[life madra]] and may use specialized tools, such as staves or constructs, to channel their power. While some Jades serve in roles like guards or elders within various sects and groups, others may possess significant numbers, such as the large group seen in the [[Sacred Valley]]. The rank is associated with specific identifiers, including badges that display emblems like scepters or shields. Although Jades are capable of performing tasks like moving heavy objects or coordinating complex displays of energy, they exist within a hierarchy that includes higher tiers such as [[Irons]] and Underlords.}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Some of the fleeing enemies were [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Jades]] are described as being clumsy.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Word has been sent to the [[Jades]] regarding the guests.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|There are at least ten [[Jades]] present in the main house.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage]] was weakened enough to be killed by [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
